Name: Dead Whale
Behavior: Mutation 0: Moves randomly and fires 3 waves of 6 projectiles toward the player at regular intervals.  Mutation 1(70%HP/20 sec): Chases the player, regularly charging toward them while firing numerous projectiles at varying speeds in all directions.  Mutation 2(40%HP/45 sec): Chases the player more frequently, charging more often while spawning a large circle of projectiles around itself.

Name: Eel
Behavior: Mutation 0: Chases the player, firing a stream of projectiles.  Mutation 1(70%HP/25 sec): Moves randomly and spawns a spiral of projectiles centered on the player, which then move toward them.  Mutation 2(40%HP/55 sec): Chases the player while continuing to spawn spirals of projectiles and having four lines of projectiles orbiting around it.
